_comment: Verus Coin (VRSC) ccminer config — Edit 'user' with your own wallet address
_wallet_note: Get your wallet address from Verus Mobile app on Play Store
_example_wallet: RDxVQALK7PudTe5SnQRNevqFtAfD3QstWd (THIS IS AN EXAMPLE - use your own!)
_threads_note: Start with 6. Reduce to 4 if phone overheats. Increase to 8 on 6GB+ RAM phones.
_retry_pause_note: Seconds to wait before reconnecting on error
